text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh, dear... I'm at a loss for words...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to prove to everyone how wonderful you
are, but...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I will win next time. I promise.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I didn't get the results I wanted this time, but you
still believe in me... right?
choice_data_list: I want you to believe in me, too.
I want you to believe in me, too.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I didn't get the results I wanted this time, but you
still believe in me... right?
choice_data_list: I want you to believe in me, too.
I want you to believe in me, too.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
...Right! I'll prove that it was right of you to put
your faith in me.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I hope you look forward to my next race.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I'll put my all into aiming for first place so I can
spoil you silly! ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I do believe in you, Trainer. In fact, I've never
once doubted you.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
But thank you for the reminder. I'll make sure your
hopes for me aren't for nothing.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
As long as I have you to guide me, I won't lose my
way.
